case_title: EDDIE MORIGUCHI VS. ROBERT KELBLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORIGUCHI, EDDIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELBLEY, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 700 O'FARRELL STREET, #105 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORIGUCHI, EDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT KELBLEY, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
